steps.title: Connect the example to the rule
steps.content: The first sentence contrasts internationally appealing demonstration sports with regionally popular sports that appeared as one-time showcases. The next sentence gives handball and kaatsen as examples that fit that pattern.

steps.title: Choose the logical result
steps.content: Choice A merely adds information. Choice C signals a concession, but the example does not weaken the first sentence. Choice D signals contrast, though the example supports the stated pattern. The needed transition means in keeping with this. The answer is B.
